title: Fantastic Science with Mr Fantastic
description: Join Reed Richards each week as he explores the wonders of space, science, and the world around us—with explosive results!
quote: Who wants to see a big explosion?
altHero: Reed Richards wearing goggles and holding an igniter
alt2: the set of the show with kids in seats, Richards stretches his arm to reach a corner of the blackboard
alt4: engine giving off a big blue flame
